## Project: Generative Stream Graphics for Live DJ Performance
- **Tech Stack**: Python 3.10+, MediaPipe, librosa, python-osc, obs-websocket-py
- **Purpose**: Reactive visuals for Breakbeat Hardcore/Jungle DJ (150-180 BPM)
- **Components**: Movement tracking, audio analysis, OBS automation, TouchDesigner integration
